m1.title: The Godfather
m1.plot: The ageing patriarch of a New York crime family hands power to his reluctant youngest son.

m2.title: Jaws
m2.plot: A police chief, a marine biologist and a grizzled shark hunter chase a killer great white terrorising a beach town.

m3.title: Star Wars
m3.tagline: A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away…
m3.plot: A farm boy joins a rebellion to rescue a princess and destroy a planet-killing battle station.

m4.title: Alien
m4.tagline: In space no one can hear you scream.
m4.plot: The crew of a commercial space freighter is hunted by a lethal creature brought aboard from a derelict ship.

m5.title: The Shining
m5.plot: A winter caretaker slowly loses his mind in an isolated haunted hotel, endangering his wife and psychic son.

m6.title: Blade Runner
m6.tagline: Man has made his match… now it's his problem.
m6.plot: A weary cop hunts four fugitive replicants through a rain-soaked future Los Angeles.

m7.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
m7.plot: A lonely boy befriends a stranded alien and helps it phone home before government agents close in.

m8.title: The Terminator
m8.tagline: Your future is in its hands.
m8.plot: An unstoppable cyborg is sent back in time to kill the mother of humanity's future saviour.

m9.title: Back to the Future
m9.tagline: He's the only kid ever to get into trouble before he was born.
m9.plot: A teenager accidentally drives a plutonium-powered DeLorean thirty years into the past and nearly erases himself.

m10.title: Aliens
m10.plot: Ripley returns to the alien planet with a squad of colonial marines to find a colony gone silent.

m11.title: Die Hard
m11.plot: An off-duty New York cop single-handedly battles thieves who seize a Los Angeles skyscraper on Christmas Eve.

m12.title: Goodfellas
m12.tagline: As far back as I can remember, I always wanted to be a gangster.
m12.plot: Three decades in the rise and fall of a mob associate and his crew.

m13.title: The Silence of the Lambs
m13.plot: A young FBI trainee seeks the counsel of an imprisoned cannibal psychiatrist to catch another serial killer.

m14.title: Jurassic Park
m14.tagline: An adventure 65 million years in the making.
m14.plot: A billionaire's dinosaur theme park suffers a catastrophic security failure during its first preview tour.

m15.title: Pulp Fiction
m15.tagline: You won't know the facts until you've seen the fiction.
m15.plot: The lives of two hitmen, a boxer and a gangster's wife tangle across interlocking Los Angeles stories.

m16.title: The Shawshank Redemption
m16.tagline: Fear can hold you prisoner. Hope can set you free.
m16.plot: A banker wrongly convicted of murder spends decades in prison quietly building a way out.

m17.title: The Lion King
m17.plot: A lion cub blamed for his father's death flees the kingdom he was born to rule.

m18.title: Toy Story
m18.plot: A cowboy doll's world is upended when a flashy space-ranger toy becomes his owner's new favourite.

m19.title: Se7en
m19.tagline: Seven deadly sins. Seven ways to die.
m19.plot: Two detectives hunt a killer staging murders around the seven deadly sins.

m20.title: Titanic
m20.tagline: Nothing on Earth could come between them.
m20.plot: A penniless artist and a first-class passenger fall in love aboard a doomed ocean liner.

m21.title: The Matrix
m21.tagline: The fight for the future begins.
m21.plot: A hacker learns reality is a simulation and joins the humans fighting the machines that built it.

m22.title: Fight Club
m22.plot: A sleepless office drone and a charismatic soap salesman start an underground bare-knuckle movement.

m23.title: Gladiator
m23.plot: A betrayed Roman general fights his way through the arena to avenge his family and his emperor.

m24.title: Spirited Away
m24.plot: A girl must work in a bathhouse for spirits to free her parents, who have been turned into pigs.

m25.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
m25.tagline: One ring to rule them all.
m25.plot: A hobbit inherits a ring of terrible power and sets out with eight companions to destroy it.

m26.title: Amélie
m26.plot: A shy Montmartre waitress secretly engineers small joys in the lives of everyone around her.

m27.title: City of God
m27.tagline: If you run, the beast catches you; if you stay, the beast eats you.
m27.plot: Two boys take opposite paths through the drug wars of a Rio favela — one a photographer, one a kingpin.

m28.title: Oldboy
m28.tagline: 15 years of imprisonment, five days of vengeance.
m28.plot: A man imprisoned in a private cell for fifteen years is released and given five days to find out why.

m29.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
m29.tagline: You can erase someone from your mind. Getting them out of your heart is another story.
m29.plot: A couple undergo a procedure to erase each other from their memories — and fall in love again inside them.

m30.title: The Dark Knight
m30.plot: Batman faces an anarchist criminal mastermind who wants to watch Gotham burn.

m31.title: WALL·E
m31.tagline: After 700 years of doing what he was built for, he'll discover what he was meant for.
m31.plot: The last trash-compacting robot on an abandoned Earth follows a sleek probe droid into space.

m32.title: Inglourious Basterds
m32.tagline: Once upon a time in Nazi-occupied France…
m32.plot: A squad of Jewish-American soldiers and a vengeful cinema owner separately plot to kill the Nazi high command.

m33.title: Avatar
m33.plot: A paraplegic marine inhabits an alien body on a moon whose forests sit on a priceless mineral.

m34.title: Inception
m34.tagline: Your mind is the scene of the crime.
m34.plot: A thief who steals secrets from dreams is hired to plant an idea instead.

m35.title: The Avengers
m35.plot: Earth's mightiest heroes are forced onto one team to repel an alien invasion of New York.

m36.title: Interstellar
m36.tagline: Mankind was born on Earth. It was never meant to die here.
m36.plot: A farmer-pilot leaves his family behind to find humanity a new home through a wormhole.

m37.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
m37.plot: A drifter and a rebel war captain flee a desert tyrant in an armoured tanker truck.

m38.title: Get Out
m38.tagline: Just because you're invited, doesn't mean you're welcome.
m38.plot: A Black photographer's weekend meeting his white girlfriend's family hides a monstrous secret.

m39.title: Avengers: Endgame
m39.plot: The surviving heroes attempt a time heist to undo the snap that erased half of all life.

m40.title: Parasite
m40.tagline: Act like you own the place.
m40.plot: A poor family cons its way into serving a wealthy household, one job at a time.

m41.title: Knives Out
m41.tagline: Everyone has a motive. No one has a clue.
m41.plot: A gentleman detective untangles the suspicious death of a crime novelist whose whole family had reasons.

m42.title: Dune
m42.plot: A duke's heir survives the betrayal of his house on a desert planet that holds the universe's most precious substance.

m43.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
m43.tagline: The universe is so much bigger than you realize.
m43.plot: A laundromat owner being audited discovers she must channel her selves across the multiverse to save it.

m44.title: Oppenheimer
m44.plot: The physicist who led the Manhattan Project reckons with the weapon he gave the world.

m45.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
m45.orig: Il buono, il brutto, il cattivo
m45.plot: Three gunslingers race and double-cross each other toward a fortune in buried Confederate gold.

m46.title: Psycho
m46.tagline: The picture you MUST see from the beginning… or not at all!
m46.plot: A secretary on the run with stolen cash checks into a lonely motel run by a nervous young man.

m47.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
m47.tagline: An epic drama of adventure and exploration.
m47.plot: A mysterious monolith guides humanity from the dawn of man to a fateful mission to Jupiter.

m48.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
m48.tagline: More than one wears the mask.
m48.plot: A Brooklyn teen becomes Spider-Man just as spider-people from other dimensions crash into his world.

v1.title: Breaking Bad
v1.plot: A terminally ill chemistry teacher cooks methamphetamine to leave his family a fortune — and finds he likes the power.
v1.creator: Vince Gilligan

v2.title: Game of Thrones
v2.plot: Noble houses scheme and war for an iron throne while an ancient threat wakes beyond a great wall of ice.
v2.creator: David Benioff

v3.title: Stranger Things
v3.tagline: The world is turning upside down.
v3.plot: A boy vanishes from a small 1980s town, and his friends find a girl with powers where he should be.
v3.creator: The Duffer Brothers

v4.title: The Office
v4.plot: A documentary crew films the everyday absurdity of a Scranton paper company and its excruciating boss.
v4.creator: Greg Daniels

v5.title: Friends
v5.plot: Six twenty-somethings navigate work, love and each other from two Manhattan apartments and a coffee shop.
v5.creator: David Crane

v6.title: The Sopranos
v6.plot: A New Jersey mob boss juggles his crime family and his actual family with the help of a psychiatrist.
v6.creator: David Chase

v7.title: Sherlock
v7.plot: A consulting detective and an army doctor solve impossible crimes across modern London.
v7.creator: Steven Moffat

v8.title: Black Mirror
v8.plot: Standalone stories probe the dark side of technology and the people it rewires.
v8.creator: Charlie Brooker

v9.title: The Wire
v9.plot: Police, dealers, docks, schools and newspapers interlock in a panoramic portrait of Baltimore.
v9.creator: David Simon

v10.title: Chernobyl
v10.tagline: What is the cost of lies?
v10.plot: Scientists and soldiers fight the invisible aftermath of the world's worst nuclear accident.
v10.creator: Craig Mazin

v11.title: Money Heist
v11.plot: A mastermind called the Professor directs eight codenamed robbers through the heist of Spain's Royal Mint.
v11.creator: Álex Pina

v12.title: Squid Game
v12.plot: Hundreds of debtors compete in deadly versions of children's games for a fortune in prize money.
v12.creator: Hwang Dong-hyuk

v13.title: The Crown
v13.plot: The reign of Queen Elizabeth II unfolds across decades of private duty and public crisis.
v13.creator: Peter Morgan

v14.title: True Detective
v14.plot: Detectives revisit the case that consumed them as each season anthologises a new haunted investigation.
v14.creator: Nic Pizzolatto

v15.title: Better Call Saul
v15.plot: A small-time hustler of a lawyer slowly becomes the man who will represent Albuquerque's biggest cook.
v15.creator: Vince Gilligan

v16.title: Dark
v16.tagline: The question is not where, but when.
v16.plot: A missing child exposes four families whose tangled fates loop across generations of a German town.
v16.creator: Baran bo Odar
